## Campaign

- Title: New City Map and Scene Components Developed

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind's development continues with the addition of new CityMap and CityScene components, bringing enhanced scene management for District 01. Explore the evolving visual environment of CodeGrind.
- CTA: Explore the new CityMap and CityScene components on CodeGrind!
- Visual brief: A screenshot or stylized graphic showcasing a cityscape or map interface, potentially with cyberpunk elements, representing the new CityMap and CityScene components.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
